evidence_label: Asia registry source radar, benchmark-only, not treatment advice
clinicaltrials_queries: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2: beta thalassemia + gene therapy/gene editing/CRISPR/HBG promoter/autologous
pubmed_query: (beta thalassemia OR transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia) AND (China OR Asia OR Japan OR Korea OR Singapore OR Indonesia OR Pakistan OR India OR Russia) AND (gene therapy OR gene editing OR transplantation OR thalidomide OR hydroxyurea) AND 2026[pdat]

pubmed_records.title: Clinical application of base editing for treating beta-thalassaemia.
Management of transfusion-dependent beta-thalassaemia in the era of novel therapies: a prioritisation-based matrix for settings with limited resources.
Low- to moderate-dose thalidomide combination rescue after luspatercept failure in transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia: a real-world cohort study.

registry_records.country: Saudi Arabia plus Germany, Italy, United States

decision_use: Use these records to ask public helpers for source disambiguation and pathway explanation only. Do not use them for Case-001 eligibility, referral, trial screening, travel, import, purchase, dosing, transfusion or chelation changes, lab contact, private-message routing, or sample routing.
